goal: Understand how gift cards work with promos.
success_criteria: Agent explains: gift card is a payment method entered at checkout, CAN be used alongside one promo code (gift cards pay, promos discount), balance in Account > Gift Cards, no expiry, not redeemable for cash.

customer_msg: I got a Loomora gift card for my birthday. How do I use it, and can I stack it with SUMMER20?
agent_msg: You can use your gift card at checkout by entering the card number and PIN when prompted. You can also check your gift card balance in your Loomora account under the Gift Cards section. As for stacking it with the SUMMER20 promo code, yes, you can use both! The gift card will cover part of the cost, and the SUMMER20 promo code will apply an additional discount to your order.
